/bin/echo -e "COMMON_DIR = ..\nTARGET = crc32\nC_SRCS = cpu-tests/crc32.c\ninclude ../common.mk" > Makefile.crc32
if make -f  Makefile.crc32; then \
	printf "[%14s] \033[1;32mPASS\033[0m\n" crc32 >> .result; \
else \
	printf "[%14s] \033[1;31m***FAIL***\033[0m\n" crc32 >> .result; \
fi
